hero.subheadline: Premium 3D wall signage, precision-cut from acrylic. Built for businesses that understand the power of physical presence.

philosophy.title: The Art of Physical Presence
philosophy.text:
3D Art creates premium wall signage for businesses that know their brand deserves more than a screen. Each sign is precision-cut from professional-grade acrylic, shaped with depth and dimension that commands attention from the first second.

We work with salons, studios, offices, and emerging brands across Latvia. Every piece is crafted to your exact colours and dimensions — fully customisable, individually approached, built to last.

services.name: Standard 3D Logo
services.description: Precision-cut acrylic sign up to 60 cm — ideal for salons and studios

services.name: Medium 3D Logo
services.description: Bold wall presence from 60–120 cm — offices and coworking spaces

services.name: Large Format Sign
services.description: Statement installations over 120 cm — reception halls and retail

services.name: Full Signage Package
services.description: Design, fabrication and professional installation included

services.name: Custom Design & Consult
services.description: From logo refinement to final 3D render — we guide the whole process

services.name: Colour Matching
services.description: Exact RAL or Pantone colour match to your brand guidelines

seo.title: 3D Art — Premium 3D Wall Signage in Latvia
seo.description: Precision-cut 3D acrylic wall logos for businesses, salons, and offices across Latvia. Custom colours, individual approach. Call +371 26032171.
